anomalies.insight: Cuttack Pickup Points up 878% week-on-week (176 vs 18 same Sunday last week) — 33.8σ above range, contributing 46% of total weekly growth. Last Sunday had almost no Cuttack demand; today's figure confirms a completely new B2B camp has been established in Cuttack this week. This is not a data anomaly — it is a new market. B2B team to urgently formalise the Cuttack client and establish a recurring contract before the relationship drifts.

Cuttack B2B up 878% week-on-week (176 vs 18 same Sunday) — 32σ above range, contributing 46% of weekly growth. The weekly comparison confirms Cuttack B2B is a new client this week, not a recurring pattern that was missed. Document the camp organiser, agree on pricing, and set up dedicated Cuttack phlebo coverage for future Sundays.

Cuttack city up 620% week-on-week (180 vs 25 same Sunday) — 22.5σ above range — contributing 45% of total +347 weekly growth. Cuttack is now 1mg's single biggest positive weekly growth story this Sunday. A new B2B camp in Cuttack has entirely changed the city's demand profile week-on-week. Prioritise for leadership visibility — this is a genuine new city expansion.

Glucose Fasting Camp up 153% week-on-week (301 vs 119 same Sunday) — 5.3σ above range — contributing 52% of weekly growth. Last Sunday had significant camp activity too (119 orders); today has grown further. This is a sustained and growing Sunday fasting camp programme that has now been active for at least 2 consecutive Sundays. B2B team to formally document all cities where this camp is running.

Confirms the Glucose Fasting Camp growth is entirely B2B. A Sunday B2B fasting camp cycle has been established — growing week-on-week. Ops to create a recurring Sunday morning B2B camp SOP to ensure consistent phlebo pre-positioning and sample cold-chain logistics every Sunday.

Dehradun up 38% week-on-week (328 vs 238 same Sunday) — 4.8σ above range — contributing 26% of weekly growth. Dehradun has now been above range across multiple days this week (Thursday and Sunday both). A sustained new B2B demand source in Dehradun is driving week-on-week growth. This is structural, not episodic — ops team to permanently increase Dehradun weekly capacity.

Cholesterol Camp up 98% week-on-week (208 vs 105 same Sunday) — 2.7σ above range — contributing 30% of weekly growth. Sunday Cholesterol Camp has doubled week-on-week, confirming the metabolic health camp programme is scaling. Check whether the camp is expanding to new cities or whether the same client is increasing their order volume.

Confirms Cholesterol Camp weekly growth is B2B-exclusive. The multi-SKU camp pattern (Glucose Fasting, Uric Acid, Cholesterol all growing WoW via B2B) is now a confirmed recurring Sunday programme. B2B team to present this as a case study for scaling the corporate wellness Sunday camp model to other Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities.

Uric Acid Camp up 72% week-on-week (219 vs 127 same Sunday) — 2.9σ above range — contributing 27% of weekly growth. All three camp SKUs (Glucose, Cholesterol, Uric Acid) growing week-on-week together confirms a single expanding wellness camp programme. The programme grew 72-153% in just one week — assess whether ops capacity scales proportionally.

Confirms Uric Acid Camp is B2B and growing week-on-week. The camp trio's consistent week-on-week growth is a strong positive signal for the B2B diagnostics segment. Present to leadership as evidence of a new scalable Sunday B2B health camp vertical.

Dehradun B2B up 43% week-on-week (271 vs 190 same Sunday) — 3.3σ above range — contributing 23% of weekly growth. The Dehradun B2B growth is sustained across both Thursdays and Sundays this week. A major new B2B client or camp organiser has been activated in Dehradun — this is now the most consistently growing B2B city this week.

Telesales down 8% week-on-week (1,258 vs 1,362 same Sunday) — 2.5σ below range — contributing 30% of weekly decline. Sunday Telesales is weaker this week than last Sunday. Check if Sunday Telesales staffing has changed, or if a Sunday outreach campaign that ran last week was not repeated today.

Gurgaon HbA1c doubled week-on-week (64 vs 32 same Sunday) — 6.9σ above range — the highest severity positive anomaly in the weekly view. HbA1c is a diabetes management test. A specific Gurgaon corporate or clinic referral source has been driving Sunday HbA1c demand this week. Identify whether it is a B2B wellness programme or a physician cluster and engage with them.

Morning 09:00 slot up 15% week-on-week (923 vs 805 same Sunday) — 1.8σ above range — contributing 34% of weekly growth. Sunday morning demand at 09:00 is growing week-on-week — driven partly by the fasting camp activity. Ensure Sunday morning slot supply at 09:00 is pre-allocated for camp orders to avoid last-minute phlebo shortages.

Dehradun 11:00 slot up 135% week-on-week (61 vs 26 same Sunday) — 5.6σ above range. Midmorning Dehradun demand has more than doubled week-on-week. Combined with all the other Dehradun signals this week, Dehradun now has a full-day Sunday demand profile that is structurally new. Ops to permanently assign dedicated Sunday phlebotomists in Dehradun.
